raw_consumer_statement:
Company : Citibank XXXX. 

Product : Citibank Credit Card ( Best Buy Visa ) Issue : Billing dispute / Fraudulent or nonexistent merchant Amount : {$1900.00} I am filing a complaint regarding Citibank 's improper denial of my credit card dispute for a fraudulent and nonexistent merchant. 

On XX/XX/year>, I made an online purchase for {$1900.00} from a website that appeared legitimate at the time of purchase. I entered my credit card information believing the merchant was real. Shortly thereafter, I discovered multiple red flags : the merchants customer service was nonresponsive via emails, the listed phone number was continuously busy, and no shipment or tracking information was ever provided. 

Within less than 10 days of the transaction, I contacted Citibank to report the issue. The product was never shipped, and the merchants website is no longer active. Citibank has also stated that they have been unable to contact the merchant or its payment processor. 

Despite these facts, Citibank denied my dispute and reposted the {$1900.00} charge to my account on XX/XX/year>, stating that because they could not retrieve the funds from the merchant, I am responsible for the charge. 

This reasoning is incorrect and unfair. Merchant non-response, inability to verify the merchant, or inability to retrieve funds should not result in liability being assigned to the cardholderparticularly when : - No goods were received - The merchant appears fraudulent or nonexistent - The cardholder reported the issue promptly within XXXX business days of the transaction Citibank 's decision appears to contradict consumer protections under the Fair Credit Billing Act and standard card-network dispute rules, which place the burden of proof on the XXXX the consumer. 

I am requesting that Citibank : - Permanently reverse the {$1900.00} charge and credit my account back {$51.00} that was diverted from an another payment to pay the minimum on the above charge. 
- Remove any related interest or fees, To date {$30.00} in deferred fees. 
- Correct my account balance and confirm I am not liable for this transaction. 

I acted promptly, reasonably, and in good faith. XXXX inability to recover funds from a fraudulent merchant should not be used as justification to deny my dispute.
